---
title: "003_transposed_genes_enrichment"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
Read transposed genes table 
```{r}
BiocManager::install("clusterProfiler")
organism = "org.At.tair.db"
BiocManager::install(organism, character.only = TRUE)
library(clusterProfiler)
transposed_genes <- fread("/groups/nordborg/projects/genome_organization/08_manuscripts/03_results/syntenic_and_transposed_genes.txt")
```
Run Gene Ontology in R 
```{r}
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.At.tair.db)
library(ggplot2)
transposed_genes_thaliana <- transposed_genes[transposed_genes$is_transposed=="TRUE" & transposed_genes$context_combined=="low_low",]

background_genes <- transposed_genes$gene_thal

ego <- enrichGO(gene          = transposed_genes_thaliana$gene_thal,
                universe      = background_genes,
                OrgDb         = org.At.tair.db,
                keyType       = "TAIR",
                ont           = "ALL",
                pAdjustMethod = "none")

# plot
dotplot(ego)
barplot(ego, showCategory = 20)
```

```{r}
library(gprofiler2)

# get your gene list
transposed_genes_thaliana <- transposed_genes[
  transposed_genes$is_transposed == "FALSE" & 
  transposed_genes$context_combined == "low_low", ]

# run enrichment
gost_results <- gost(
  query = transposed_genes_thaliana$gene_thal,
  organism = "athaliana",          # Arabidopsis thaliana
  sources = c("GO:BP", "GO:MF", "GO:CC"),  # adjust as needed
  significant = TRUE,
  correction_method = "fdr"        # or "bonferroni", "none"
)

# plot
gost_results$result %>%
  arrange(p_value) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = -log10(p_value), y = reorder(term_name, -p_value), 
             color = source, size = intersection_size)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(x = "-log10(p-value)", y = "", size = "Gene count", color = "Source") +
  theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~source)
```
